metadata.description: 19 modular skills that teach AI coding assistants idiomatic Go, derived from Effective Go, Google Go Style Guide, Uber Go Style Guide, and Go Wiki CodeReviewComments

plugins.name: golang-skills
plugins.description: 19 Go skills that activate automatically to guide idiomatic style, naming, error handling, testing, concurrency, documentation, and more. Tuned per agentskills.io best practices with procedural guidance and progressive disclosure.
